---
pagetitle: "CV — José C. Milisenda"
---

::: {.content-visible when-profile="en"}

# Curriculum Vitae {.title}

[[Download PDF](assets/Milisenda_CV.pdf) · Updated 2026]{.hero-role}

## Education

::: {.cv-entry}
[**PhD in Medicine**, *cum laude* — Universitat de Barcelona]{} · [2019]{.date}<br>
Advisor: Josep Maria Grau Junyent.
:::
::: {.cv-entry}
[**Specialist in Internal Medicine** (MIR) — Hospital Clínic de Barcelona]{} · [2010–2015]{.date}
:::
::: {.cv-entry}
[**MD** — National University of Córdoba, Argentina]{} · [2003–2009]{.date}
:::
::: {.cv-entry}
[Postgraduate diplomas & master's: Molecular Medicine (Autoimmune Diseases, UB); *DIU de Myologie* (Pierre & Marie Curie, Paris VI); Medical Genetics (València); Inherited Metabolic Diseases (Santiago de Compostela); Lysosomal Diseases (Alcalá); Design & Statistics in Health Sciences (UAB).]{}
:::

## Appointments

::: {.cv-entry}
[**Senior Physician, Internal Medicine**, and **Head of the Unit of Neuromuscular, Mitochondrial and Autonomic Nervous System Diseases (UF-MNMA)** — Hospital Clínic de Barcelona]{} · [2017–present]{.date}
:::
::: {.cv-entry}
[**Associate Professor** — Faculty of Medicine & Health Sciences, Universitat de Barcelona]{} · [2018–present]{.date}
:::
::: {.cv-entry}
[**Research stays** — NIH / NIAMS, Bethesda, USA (postdoctoral 2021–2022; visiting 2017)]{}
:::

## Clinical activity

Reference physician for muscular and inherited metabolic diseases at Hospital Clínic de Barcelona — both intra-hospital (internal referrals from pulmonology, cardiology, surgery, endocrinology and others) and as a national and international referral for these conditions.

- Leads the **muscle-disease arm** of the Hospital Clínic muscular & metabolic diseases group (metabolic arm led by Dr. Pedro Moreno), coordinating multidisciplinary care across neurology, pneumology, cardiology, rehabilitation, dermatology, endocrinology, genetics and psychiatry.
- Runs a **monographic referral outpatient clinic** for adults with muscular and metabolic diseases (~280 active patients; ~80–90 new and ~450 follow-up visits per year), including structured transfer of adult patients from the pediatric Hospital Sant Joan de Déu.
- **Coordinates 100% of the group's diagnostic procedures and personally performs ~80%** in the Internal Medicine Day Hospital: muscle biopsy (~120–140/yr), nerve biopsy (15–20/yr), skin biopsy (7–10/yr) and forearm ischemia testing.
- Created and coordinates a **private biobank** (muscle, plasma, serum, DNA) at IDIBAPS — over **2,000 samples** — enabling national and international research collaborations; designed the standardized biopsy-request circuit now used across Catalonia, Spain and Latin America.
- Leads **weekly muscle-pathology sessions** (Fridays) with virtual participation from centers in Spain, Latin America and the USA.
- Active in general internal medicine (hospitalization ward and on-call duties).

**Care innovations**

- Introduced new therapies into Internal Medicine: enzyme-replacement therapy (Gaucher, Pompe), 3,4-diaminopyridine (congenital myasthenic syndromes), and anti–plasma cell therapy (teclistamab) for refractory idiopathic inflammatory myopathy, in collaboration with Hematology.
- Implemented **anti-human IgG immunohistochemistry** on muscle tissue as a new diagnostic technique.
- Optimized circuits for genetic testing and for research referral of undiagnosed patients.

**Reference networks & accreditations**

- Member of **CSUR** and **XUEC** accredited groups (Congenital Metabolic Diseases; Systemic Autoimmune Diseases).
- Member of a funded **Consolidated Research Group (GRC)** accredited by AGAUR (2021 SGR 01423), IDIBAPS.
- Contributor to two **ENMC international workshops** (2026): #293 (immune-checkpoint-inhibitor myotoxicity) and #294 (paraproteinemic myopathies).

## Teaching

::: {.cv-entry}
[Associate Professor — *Clinical Semiology & Medical Ethics* (Medicine) and *Pathophysiology & Imaging* (Nursing), UB]{} · [2018–present]{.date}
:::
::: {.cv-entry}
[Coordinator & lecturer — Master's in Advanced Medical Competencies: *Autoimmune Diseases*, UB]{} · [2016–present]{.date}
:::

## Grants & Awards

::: {.cv-entry}
[**Emili Letang End-of-Residency Award**, Hospital Clínic — project on anti-mitochondrial M2 antibody myopathy]{} · [2015–2016]{.date}
:::
::: {.cv-entry}
[International research-stay fellowship, PhD programme *Medicina i Recerca Translacional*]{} · [2016–2017]{.date}
:::
::: {.cv-entry}
[Multiple best-oral-communication awards, national & Catalan internal-medicine congresses]{}
:::

## Selected publications

*Name highlighted below. The full, continuously updated list is generated from PubMed — see [Complete list](#complete-list).*

::: {.pub .featured}
[**Milisenda JC**]{.me}, Pinal-Fernandez I, Lloyd TE, et al. The pattern of MHC class I expression in muscle biopsies from patients with myositis and other neuromuscular disorders. [*Rheumatology*. 2023.]{.venue}
:::
::: {.pub .featured}
[**Milisenda JC**]{.me}, Pinal-Fernandez I, Lloyd TE, Grau JM, Miller FW, Selva-O'Callaghan A, et al. Accumulation of autophagosome cargo protein p62 is common in idiopathic inflammatory myopathies. [*Clin Exp Rheumatol*. 2020.]{.venue}
:::
::: {.pub .featured}
Pinal-Fernandez I, Casal-Dominguez M, Derfoul A, [**Milisenda JC**]{.me}, et al. Machine-learning algorithms reveal unique gene-expression profiles in muscle biopsies from patients with different types of myositis. [*Ann Rheum Dis*. 2020.]{.venue}
:::
::: {.pub .featured}
Montagne JM, Zheng XA, Pinal-Fernandez I, [**Milisenda JC**]{.me}, et al. Ultra-efficient sequencing of T-cell receptor repertoires reveals shared responses in muscle from patients with myositis. [*EBioMedicine*. 2020.]{.venue}
:::
::: {.pub .featured}
Seguí F, González-Quereda L, Sánchez A, [**Milisenda JC**]{.me}, et al. Anoctamin-5 (ANO5) muscular dystrophy — three phenotypes and a new histological pattern. [*Neurol Sci*. 2020.]{.venue}
:::

## Complete list {#complete-list}

{{< include _auto_publications.qmd >}}

## Skills, service & memberships

::: {.cv-entry}
[**Data & methods** — statistical analysis (SPSS), reference management, GCP-certified for clinical trials.]{}
:::
::: {.cv-entry}
[**Societies** — Spanish Society of Internal Medicine (SEMI): Minority Diseases, Clinical Ultrasound, and Systemic Autoimmune Diseases groups.]{}
:::
::: {.cv-entry}
[**Languages** — Spanish (native), English (advanced), Catalan & French (intermediate).]{}
:::

:::

<!-- ==================== CATALÀ ==================== -->
::: {.content-visible when-profile="ca"}
# Currículum {.title}

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple"}
Aquesta pàgina encara està en construcció en català. De moment, consulta la **[versió en anglès](../cv.html)**, més completa.
:::

[[Descarrega el PDF](assets/Milisenda_CV.pdf)]{.hero-role}
:::

<!-- ==================== ESPAÑOL ==================== -->
::: {.content-visible when-profile="es"}
# Currículum {.title}

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple"}
Esta página todavía está en construcción en español. Por ahora, consulta la **[versión en inglés](../cv.html)**, más completa.
:::

[[Descargar PDF](assets/Milisenda_CV.pdf)]{.hero-role}
:::
